question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/block/StreamProperties.java -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: onError()] Can an unprivileged external user cause all configured block nodes to be marked inactive by triggering exactly maxSubscribeAttempts (default 3) consecutive streaming failures per node, forcing readmitDelay (default 60 seconds) cooldown on every node simultaneously, thereby freezing block ingestion for 60 seconds which is 500%+ of the ~2-3 second average Hedera block time?
